name: Roboflow Universe
description: Run a Roboflow object-detection model against a hosted image URL and return JSON predictions containing classes, confidence, and bounding boxes.

auth.hint: Create a Roboflow workspace key and send it in the api_key query parameter. Keep private keys in Arthur MCP Secrets.

tools.name: run_object_detection
tools.description: Run a selected Roboflow model version against a remotely hosted image and return JSON object-detection predictions.

params.name: project_id
params.description: URL-safe Roboflow project or dataset identifier.

params.name: image
params.description: URL-encoded public image URL to analyze.

params.name: confidence
params.description: Minimum prediction confidence from 0 through 100; documented default is 40.

params.name: overlap
params.description: Maximum same-class box overlap percentage before boxes are combined; documented default is 30.

params.name: format
params.description: Use json for structured predictions; image returns a binary annotated image.
